announce.eclipse.day.generic.sub: A new day dawns over the drowned world.
announce.eclipse.day.generic.title: A NEW DAY DAWNS
announce.eclipse.ferryman.victory.sub: The toll is paid in defiance — everyone comes home.
announce.eclipse.ferryman.victory.title: THE CROSSING ENDS
announce.eclipse.ferryman.wipe.sub: The ship sails on with every soul aboard.
announce.eclipse.ferryman.wipe.title: THE ECLIPSE PREVAILS
announce.eclipse.goal.title: GOAL COMPLETE
announce.eclipse.herald.sub: Its core is yours — the altar hungers for it.
announce.eclipse.herald.title: THE HERALD FALLS
announce.eclipse.milestone.1: The altar reaches level 1 — its first hunger sated.
announce.eclipse.milestone.2: The altar reaches level 2 — gold sings in its veins.
announce.eclipse.milestone.3: The altar reaches level 3 — diamonds feed the flame.
announce.eclipse.milestone.4: The altar reaches level 4 — pearls whisper of the void.
announce.eclipse.milestone.5: The altar reaches level 5 — it hungers no more.
announce.eclipse.milestone.title: THE ALTAR ASCENDS
announce.eclipse.night.pale.sub: Something wearing your face walks the dark.
announce.eclipse.night.pale.title: PALE NIGHT
announce.eclipse.night.umbral.sub: The packs run double tonight. Stay in the light.
announce.eclipse.night.umbral.title: UMBRAL NIGHT
announce.eclipse.stage.nether: The nether disc swells beneath the crust.
announce.eclipse.stage.overworld: The ring has widened — new lands break the waves.
announce.eclipse.stage.title: THE WORLD GROWS
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.aeronautics: Seal broken: airships may take flight.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.armor: Seal broken: armor may be worn.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.brewing: Seal broken: brewing stands bubble to life.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.create: Seal broken: Create contraptions are permitted.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.createadditi: Seal broken: electricity hums through the machines.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.ender_chests: Seal broken: ender chests open their void.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.farmersdelig: Seal broken: the feast may be cooked.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.herald_slain: Seal broken: the Herald is slain — the eclipse recoils.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.main_invento: Seal broken: your full inventory is restored.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.nether: Seal broken: the nether accepts visitors.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.sable: Seal broken: the sable arts are yours.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.simulated: Seal broken: simulated districts come online.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.smithing: Seal broken: smithing templates may be used.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.sophisticate: Seal broken: backpacks may be carried.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.supplementar: Seal broken: rigging and contrivances are permitted.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.workbenches: Seal broken: workstations may be used.
announce.eclipse.unlock.title: SEAL BROKEN
bestiary.eclipse.deckhand.lore: Mute rowers of the ghost ship. They pulled us through the black water once, and they will keep rowing long after we are gone. They never look up — pray they never do.
bestiary.eclipse.deckhand.name: Deckhand
bestiary.eclipse.ferryman.lore: He rows the drowned to the far shore and takes his toll in souls. On the last day the ship sails again — pay him in defiance, and everyone comes home.
bestiary.eclipse.ferryman.name: The Ferryman
bestiary.eclipse.gazer.lore: A hooded shape at the edge of the torchlight. It only watches. Meet its gaze and it is gone — but never far, and never for long.
bestiary.eclipse.gazer.name: Gazer
bestiary.eclipse.herald.lore: A broken godhead of black glass and corona shards, sent ahead of the eclipse to weigh us. Its core is the key the altar hungers for.
bestiary.eclipse.herald.name: The Herald of the Eclipse
bestiary.eclipse.the_other.lore: On pale nights it walks among us wearing our uniform. It moves like a friend, stops like a friend, stares like nothing human. Check the eyes before you turn your back.
bestiary.eclipse.the_other.name: The Other
bestiary.eclipse.umbral_stalker.lore: Obsidian-furred pack hunters with shards of violet light along the spine. Where one growls, three more circle. Dawn is your only ally.
bestiary.eclipse.umbral_stalker.name: Umbral Stalker
command.eclipse.rt.add.failed: Cannot shift the boundary: the engine is not armed
command.eclipse.rt.add.ok: Boundary shifted by %s — now firing in %s
command.eclipse.rt.armed: Real-time day engine armed — next boundary %s (in %s)
command.eclipse.rt.disarmed: Real-time day engine disarmed — days no longer advance automatically
command.eclipse.rt.pause.failed: Cannot pause: the engine is not armed (or is already paused)
command.eclipse.rt.pause.ok: Day clock paused — %s frozen on the clock
command.eclipse.rt.resume.failed: Cannot resume: the day clock is not paused
command.eclipse.skills.tree_reset: Skill tree of %s reset, points refunded
config.eclipse.ores.loaded: Eclipse ores loaded: {} overworld + {} nether entries
config.eclipse.ores.missing_block: Skipping ore '{}' with no block id in ores.json
config.eclipse.ores.missing_id: Skipping ore entry with no id in ores.json
config.eclipse.ores.read_failed: Failed to read ore config {}; using built-in defaults
config.eclipse.ores.skip_mod: Skipping ore '{}' — required mod '{}' is not loaded
config.eclipse.ores.write_failed: Failed to write default ore config {}
dev.eclipse.doc.dev.reload: Hot-reload all configs and re-sync clients
dev.eclipse.doc.fx.caption: Show a cinematic caption on your client in the given style (subtitle, title or whisper).
dev.eclipse.doc.fx.cutscene.play: Play a cutscene for ALL players: global teleport gather, view-distance bump, return after.
dev.eclipse.doc.fx.cutscene.preview: Trace a cutscene flight path with particles (arc-length spaced; no camera takeover).
dev.eclipse.doc.fx.cutscene.stop: Abort every active cutscene session (unfreeze + return gathered players).
dev.eclipse.doc.fx.emitter: Spawn a Quasar emitter on your client, at your feet or at the given position.
dev.eclipse.doc.fx.post: Force an Eclipse Veil post pipeline on/off on your client, or list live pipelines.
dev.eclipse.doc.fx.rift: Open a rift tear FX at a position with the given width; 'rift close' closes your last one.
dev.eclipse.doc.fx.sequence: Replay one phase of a scripted sequence in FX-only mode (no world/state changes).
dev.eclipse.doc.fx.storm: Spawn/dissipate a dev storm wall or vortex at your position, or fire a lightning bolt where you look.
dev.eclipse.doc.fx.sun.debug: Toggle the sun-debug HUD cross at the CPU-projected sun point (compare against the disc).
dev.eclipse.doc.fx.supplybeam: Toggle a test supply-beam marker at your position (add on first run, remove on second).
dev.eclipse.doc.fx.uniform: Override one float uniform of a Veil post pipeline on your client (debug knob).
dev.eclipse.doc.fx.viewdist: Push a cinematic view distance to your client, or reset the server+client bump.
dev.eclipse.doc.xboxevent.lockout.clear: Clears voluntary-leave lockouts: one player or all (current instance).
dev.eclipse.doc.xboxevent.portal: Portal maintenance: 'here' re-places it at your position, 'remove' despawns it.
dev.eclipse.doc.xboxevent.reset: Stages a world reset: the dimension is deleted and re-extracted from the bundled zip at next boot.
dev.eclipse.doc.xboxevent.reward.set: Overrides the participation reward buff/minutes for the current instance only.
dev.eclipse.doc.xboxevent.start: Opens the Xbox event: installs a portal near spawn, announces it, starts the timer (default 30 min).
dev.eclipse.doc.xboxevent.status: Shows phase, world, remaining time, participants, lockouts, portal, reward, installed worlds.
dev.eclipse.doc.xboxevent.stop: Ends the event: 'now' returns everyone immediately, otherwise a 10 s grace window.
dev.eclipse.doc.xboxevent.time: Adjusts the running timer: set <dur>, add <dur>, reduce <dur> (e.g. 10m, 90s, 1h10m).
dev.eclipse.doc.xboxleave: Player command (perm 0): voluntarily leave the Xbox world with confirmation; inventory kept, lockout until next event.
dev.eclipse.xbox.portal.in_xbox_dim: You cannot place the portal inside an Xbox world.
dev.eclipse.xbox.portal.none: There is no portal to remove.
dev.eclipse.xbox.portal.nospot: No safe portal spot found within %1$s–%2$s blocks of spawn — event started without a portal. Use '/dev xboxevent portal here'.
dev.eclipse.xbox.reset.active: Cannot stage a reset for '%1$s' while an event is running there.
dev.eclipse.xbox.reset.staged: Reset staged for '%1$s' — the world is re-extracted fresh at the next server start.
dev.eclipse.xbox.reward.set: Participation reward overridden: %1$s for %2$s min (this instance).
dev.eclipse.xbox.start.already: An event is already running (world %1$s, %2$s remaining). Stop it first.
dev.eclipse.xbox.start.no_level: Dimension %1$s is not loaded — datapack dimension missing?
dev.eclipse.xbox.start.not_installed: World '%1$s' is not installed yet — the installer runs at server start; check the log.
dev.eclipse.xbox.started: Xbox event started: world %1$s, %2$s min, instance #%3$s.
dev.eclipse.xbox.stop.closing: Event in %1$s is closing: players have %2$s seconds to say goodbye.
dev.eclipse.xbox.stop.now: Event in %1$s stopped immediately — all players returned.
eclipse.caption.demo.title: THE ECLIPSE
eclipse.caption.finale.dawn: The light returns. The world breathes again.
eclipse.xbox.announce.end: The rift to %1$s has closed. Everyone is back home.
eclipse.xbox.announce.start: The rift to %1$s has opened! You have %2$s minutes — find the portal near spawn!
eclipse.xbox.announce.stopping: The rift to %1$s is collapsing! It closes in %2$s seconds — head back now!
eclipse.xbox.announce.time_changed: The rift timer has shifted: %1$s remaining.
eclipse.xbox.announce.warn1: 1 minute! The rift to %1$s is about to close!
eclipse.xbox.announce.warn5: 5 minutes until the rift to %1$s closes!
eclipse.xbox.enter.leavebutton.hover: Runs /xboxleave — you keep your whole inventory.
eclipse.xbox.enter.leaveline: You can leave at any time:
eclipse.xbox.enter.locked: You left this expedition — the rift stays closed for you until the next event.
eclipse.xbox.enter.subtitle: A world from another time…
eclipse.xbox.exit.closed: The event was ended — the rift set you down safely.
eclipse.xbox.exit.death: The rift caught you! You are back — nothing was lost, no life spent.
eclipse.xbox.exit.left: You left the old world. See you at the next rift!
eclipse.xbox.exit.timeup: Time is up — the rift pulled you back home.
eclipse.xbox.leave.confirm: Leave the old world now? You will be locked out for the rest of this event.
eclipse.xbox.leave.confirm.hover: Confirms leaving — inventory is kept, re-entry only next event.
eclipse.xbox.leave.outside: You are not inside the event world.
eclipse.xboxworld.tu1.name: Tutorial World (TU1) — 2012
eclipse.xboxworld.tu12.name: Tutorial World (TU12) — 2012
eclipse.xboxworld.tu14.name: Tutorial World (TU14) — 2013
gui.eclipse.artifact.goals.none: No goals received yet — the server will sync them shortly.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line1: 1. Every player has a limited number of lives. When your last life is lost, your soul is banned from the world until other players revive you at the altar.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line10: 10. Admin decisions are final. Report issues on the event Discord instead of arguing in game.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line2: 2. Everyone is anonymous: chat, name tags, the tab list, signs, books and anvil naming are sealed. Speak only through the proximity voice chat.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line3: 3. The event runs in days. Each day brings three goals, new unlocks and a larger world border. Check this menu every day.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line4: 4. Parts of your inventory, workstations, dimensions and entire mods stay sealed until the matching day or altar milestone unlocks them.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line5: 5. The altar accepts offerings. Completing a milestone raises the altar level and unlocks new powers for everybody.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line6: 6. You may sacrifice one of your own lives at the altar; the heart fragment it yields is an ingredient for reviving banned players.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line7: 7. Graves protect a fallen player's items for a grace period. Do not touch a fresh grave that is not yours.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line8: 8. The arm artifact is bound to you: it sits sealed in the top-right inventory slot and cannot be dropped, stored or moved. Right-click it (or press J) to open this ledger.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line9: 9. Teaming, alliances and betrayal are allowed — griefing spawn and exploiting bugs are not.
gui.eclipse.goaleditor.title: Goal Editor — days.json
gui.eclipse.goaleditor.too_large: Edit exceeds 64 KB — trim it down.
gui.eclipse.handbook.footer: 1–%1$s / arrows turn the pages · %2$s closes the ledger
gui.eclipse.handbook.hint: 1–6 / arrow keys turn the pages · %s closes the ledger
gui.eclipse.handbook.rewards.none: The altar's demands have not been revealed yet — the server will sync them shortly.
gui.eclipse.handbook.timeline.empty: The spine is still blank — the server will sync it shortly.
gui.eclipse.handbook.title: The Ledger of the Drowned
gui.eclipse.journey.error.1: Connection refused: the sun is still awake.
gui.eclipse.journey.error.2: The veil is not yet thin enough. Try again when the light dies.
gui.eclipse.journey.error.3: Signal lost in the umbra — 0 of 1 moons answered.
gui.eclipse.journey.error.4: Access denied: your shadow is not long enough yet.
gui.eclipse.journey.error.5: Protocol ECLIPSE/9 not ready. The darkness is still loading…
gui.eclipse.journey.error.connect: No path through the dark: %s did not answer.
gui.eclipse.journey.error.nohost: No destination in the fog — serverHost is missing in eclipse-journey.toml.
gui.eclipse.journey.error.title: ERROR 0xECL1PSE
gui.eclipse.settings.subtitle: Cosmetic client options · saved immediately
gui.eclipse.settings.title: Eclipse Settings
gui.eclipse.title.disclaimer: Unofficial community event mod · Not affiliated with Mojang
item.eclipse.vitae_shard.full: Your vessel already holds seven hearts.
item.eclipse.vitae_shard.used: A heart takes root — %s now beat within you.
message.eclipse.command_sealed: That command is sealed — the Eclipse keeps every soul nameless.
message.eclipse.door.closed: Barred from beyond - no hand opens this door.
message.eclipse.door.locked: The door strains, but will not yield to the dead.
message.eclipse.ferryman.kneel: The Ferryman kneels — cut down his crew, relight the lanterns.
message.eclipse.goals_denied: Config edit rejected: permission level 3 required.
message.eclipse.goals_updated: %s saved — config reloaded and re-synced to all players.
message.eclipse.sanctum_protected: The Sanctum of the Occluded Sun rejects your touch.
message.eclipse.sealed.armor: Armor and offhand are still sealed.
message.eclipse.sealed.main_inventory: Your main inventory is still sealed — hotbar only.
message.eclipse.sealed.mod: That is still sealed by the Eclipse.
message.eclipse.skill.buy.missing_prereq: Requires an earlier node in that branch.
message.eclipse.skill.proc.bonus_ore: Earthen Bond — a bonus chunk of raw ore!
message.eclipse.skill.proc.double_loot: Reaper — the kill yields double loot!
message.eclipse.skill.proc.double_ore: Fortune's Echo — the vein yields double!
message.eclipse.skill.procmsg.off: Skill proc messages hidden. Re-enable with /skills procmsg on
ritual.eclipse.altar.wrong_item: The altar does not desire this.
ritual.eclipse.finale.already: The Ferryman is already waiting on his deck.
ritual.eclipse.finale.day: The ship will not sail before the last day.
ritual.eclipse.finale.dusk: The crossing only begins after dusk.
ritual.eclipse.heart.blocked: You cannot sacrifice your last life.
ritual.eclipse.heart.confirm: Sneak-use again within 5s to sacrifice a life.
ritual.eclipse.lantern.ghost_only: Only the dead may tend these flames.
ritual.eclipse.lure.already: The Herald already looms over the sanctum.
ritual.eclipse.lure.day: The lure only answers after dusk.
ritual.eclipse.lure.early: The Herald will not answer before the seventh day.
ritual.eclipse.lure.sneak_hint: Sneak and use the lure to call the Herald down.
ritual.eclipse.revive.already_running: A ritual is already in progress here.
ritual.eclipse.revive.no_selection: Choose a soul first (use the sigil without sneaking).
shop.eclipse.deposit_hint: Sneak-use to bank shards; sneak-punch to buy the shown offer.
shop.eclipse.favor_already: The Eclipse's favor already flows — wait for dawn.
shop.eclipse.favor_granted: The Eclipse relents — regeneration and saturation until dawn.
shop.eclipse.need: The altar demands %1$s shards; you banked only %2$s.
shop.eclipse.offer: Altar shop: %1$s — %2$s shards (you have %3$s). Sneak-punch to buy.
shop.eclipse.offer_pooled: Altar shop: %1$s — %2$s POOLED shards (pool holds %3$s). Sneak-punch to call it.
shop.eclipse.pool_need: The pool holds %2$s of the %1$s shards this demands.
shop.eclipse.shard_seed: Sneak-use shards on the altar to bank them.
